-{"id":"bd-x7i7c","title":"Pre-existing: SQLite scan column count mismatch (31 vs 32)","description":"Multiple tests failing on main with: 'sql: expected 31 destination arguments in Scan, not 32'

Affected tests:
- TestGetIssuesByLabel (internal/storage/sqlite)
- TestMigrateContentHashColumn (internal/storage/sqlite)
- TestResolveProtoIDOrTitle (cmd/bd)

Root cause appears to be a column added to the issues table without updating all Scan calls.

 {"id":"bd-xai7h","title":"Review and merge PR #999: bsv terminal viewer","description":"Review and merge PR #999 from bglenden that adds bsv (Rust TUI viewer) to COMMUNITY_TOOLS.md.

Easy-win criteria:
- Documentation-only change (2 lines added)
- Adds link to external community tool
- No code changes, just adding to community tools list

Steps:
1. gh pr checkout 999 --repo steveyegge/beads
2. Verify the addition follows existing format in COMMUNITY_TOOLS.md
3. Check the linked repo exists and is legitimate
4. gh pr merge 999 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash
